review.consensus_defect: Did not isolate the followup cascade from a second observationally-identical post-merge path (autoStartUnblockedDependencyIssue); green attributable only by accident of default manual Start Mode.
fixes_applied: pin start_mode=manual + dependency_auto_chain=false in beforeAll, restore in afterAll (isolation)
retry merge POST on 409/5xx (single per-repo merge lock)
harden pref restore behind didReadPrefs gate, per-key try/catch
document global-pref cross-file coupling + test.describe.configure serial
